name: Bare except swallows all exceptions in import_users_from_csv
description: import_users_from_csv wraps the per-row processing in 'except: pass' — a bare except with no exception type specified. This catches and silently discards every exception including KeyboardInterrupt, SystemExit, and MemoryError, making failures invisible to the caller.

expected_findings.description: import_users_from_csv uses a bare 'except: pass' which catches all exceptions including BaseException subclasses. Errors during row parsing or database insertion are silently swallowed, returning a misleading count to the caller.
new_id is computed as max(db.USERS.keys(), default=0) + 1 inside the loop. In concurrent scenarios multiple threads could compute the same max and generate duplicate IDs.

expected_clean.description: Pure CSV parsing utilities with no exception handling
